case_title: GIOSSO CHILDRENS TRUST VS. RAMJAN SARIFF et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT SARIFF, RAMJAN

UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF MAY-21-2002, FOR DEFAULT PROVE UP ON 5/21/02. GRANTED PER WRITTEN ORDER OF COMM. LORETTA M. NORRIS, W/ CANDACE YOUNT, CSR, AND FRANK M. HENTON, CT. CLERK.

OTHER NON EXEMPT COMPLAINTS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GIOSSO CHILDRENS TRUST AS TO DEFENDANT SARIFF, RAMJAN 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAY-24-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-25-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       APR-26-2002
